query:
-- Find customers with unassigned services that ALSO have billing items
SELECT 
  c.name,
  c.externalId,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) AS unassigned_services,
  COUNT(DISTINCT bi.externalId) AS billing_items_available
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId AND bi.lineAmount > 0
WHERE s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'flagged_for_termination')
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND s.customerExternalId != ''
  AND s.externalId NOT IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM service_billing_assignments)
  AND s.externalId NOT IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM unbillable_services)
GROUP BY c.name, c.externalId
HAVING billing_items_available > 0
ORDER BY unassigned_services DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Find customers with unassigned services that ALSO have billing items
SELECT 
  c.name,
  c.externalId,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) AS unassigned_services,
  COUNT(DISTINCT bi.externalId) AS billing_items_available
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId AND bi.lineAmount > 0
WHERE s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'flagged_for_termination')
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND s.customerExternalId != ''
  AND s.externalId NOT IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM service_billing_assignments)
  AND s.externalId NOT IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM unbillable_services)
GROUP BY c.name, c.externalId
HAVING billing_items_available > 0
ORDER BY unassigned_services DESC
LIMIT 10;
